Untitled

2022-07-06

initialize

rm(list = ls())
gc()
##          used (Mb) gc trigger (Mb) max used (Mb)
## Ncells 504757 27.0    1120157 59.9   644011 34.4
## Vcells 900965  6.9    8388608 64.0  1635257 12.5
devtools::load_all(".")
## ℹ Loading Dispatching
library(magrittr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'magrittr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:testthat':
## 
##     equals, is_less_than, not
library(foreach)
library(codetools)
library(ggplot2)

read data

data_establishment <- readRDS("output/data_establishments.RDS" %>% here::here())
num_parttemp <- readRDS("output/num_parttemp_cz.RDS" %>% here::here())
num_est <- readRDS("output/num_establishments_cz.RDS" %>% here::here())
distance_iv <- readRDS("output/distance_iv.RDS" %>% here::here())
distance_iv_each <- readRDS("output/distance_iv_each.RDS" %>% here::here())
hausman_iv <- readRDS("output/hausman_iv.RDS" %>% here::here())
rivals_iv <- readRDS("output/num_rivals_iv.RDS" %>% here::here())
iv_selected <- readRDS("output/iv_selected.RDS" %>% here::here())

partwage_cz <- readRDS("output/partwage_cz.RDS" %>% here::here())
mw <- readRDS("cleaned/data_pref_year_minimum_wage.RDS" %>% here::here())

matching_function_estimate <- readRDS(file = "output/estimate_matching_function/matching_function_firmFE.RDS" %>% here::here())

set constant

matching_param_spec <- "iv_dist_each_no_sd_names"
matching_params <- 
  matching_function_estimate[[matching_param_spec]]$coefficients %>% 
  as.numeric()

transform data

construct analysis sample

data_estimation <-
  transform_data_estimation(
    data_establishment,
    num_parttemp,
    num_est,
    partwage_cz,
    mw,
    distance_iv,
    distance_iv_each,
    rivals_iv,
    hausman_iv,
    matching_params
  )

var_names <-
  make_names_estimation(
    data_estimation,
    iv_selected
  ) 

var_names$iv_names <- var_names[[matching_param_spec]]

add variables

add match per registration

data_estimation <-
  data_estimation %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Q_per_D_W = Q/D_W
  )

make residual

fml <- 
  paste(
    var_names$x_names,
    collapse = " + "
  ) %>%
  paste(
    .,
    "| cz + year + firm_id"
  )

data_estimation <-
  data_estimation %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    y_W_residual =
      fixest::feols(
        data = .,
        fml = 
          paste(
            "y_W ~",
            fml
          ) %>%
          as.formula()
      )$residuals,
    y_F_residual =
      fixest::feols(
        data = .,
        fml = 
          paste(
            "y_F ~",
            fml
          ) %>%
          as.formula()
      )$residuals,
    wage_residual =
      fixest::feols(
        data = .,
        fml = 
          paste(
            "wage ~",
            fml
          ) %>%
          as.formula()
      )$residuals,
    fee_residual =
      fixest::feols(
        data = .,
        fml = 
          paste(
            "fee ~",
            fml
          ) %>%
          as.formula()
      )$residuals
  )

make subsample

data_type_0 <-
  data_estimation %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    type_0 == 1
  )

estimate demand function

data <- data_type_0

plot

data %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = wage,
      y = log(D_W)
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    formula = y ~ x,
    method = "lm", 
    se = FALSE
    ) +
  theme_classic()

data %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = fee,
      y = log(D_F)
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    formula = y ~ x,
    method = "lm", 
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic()

data %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = wage,
      y = log(Q_per_D_W)
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    formula = y ~ x,
    method = "lm", 
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic()

data %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = wage,
      y = y_W
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    formula = y ~ x,
    method = "lm", 
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic()

data %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = fee,
      y = y_F
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    formula = y ~ x,
    method = "lm", 
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic()

data %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = wage_residual,
      y = y_W_residual
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    formula = y ~ x,
    method = "lm", 
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic()

data %>%
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = fee_residual,
      y = y_F_residual
    )
  ) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    formula = y ~ x,
    method = "lm", 
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic()

bin plot

binsreg::binsreg(
  y = log(data$D_W),
  x = data$wage
)

## Call: binsreg
## 
## Binscatter Plot
## Bin selection method (binsmethod)  =  IMSE direct plug-in
## Placement (binspos)                =  Quantile-spaced
## Derivative (deriv)                 =  0
## 
## Group (by)                         =  Full Sample
## Sample size (n)                    =  20395
## # of distinct values (Ndist)       =  12159
## # of clusters (Nclust)             =  NA
## dots, degree (p)                   =  0
## dots, smooth (s)                   =  0
## # of bins (nbins)                  =  34
binsreg::binsreg(
  y = log(data$D_F),
  x = data$fee
)

## Call: binsreg
## 
## Binscatter Plot
## Bin selection method (binsmethod)  =  IMSE direct plug-in
## Placement (binspos)                =  Quantile-spaced
## Derivative (deriv)                 =  0
## 
## Group (by)                         =  Full Sample
## Sample size (n)                    =  20395
## # of distinct values (Ndist)       =  12820
## # of clusters (Nclust)             =  NA
## dots, degree (p)                   =  0
## dots, smooth (s)                   =  0
## # of bins (nbins)                  =  30
binsreg::binsreg(
  y = log(data$Q_per_D_W),
  x = data$wage
)

## Call: binsreg
## 
## Binscatter Plot
## Bin selection method (binsmethod)  =  IMSE direct plug-in
## Placement (binspos)                =  Quantile-spaced
## Derivative (deriv)                 =  0
## 
## Group (by)                         =  Full Sample
## Sample size (n)                    =  20395
## # of distinct values (Ndist)       =  12159
## # of clusters (Nclust)             =  NA
## dots, degree (p)                   =  0
## dots, smooth (s)                   =  0
## # of bins (nbins)                  =  34
binsreg::binsreg(
  y = data$y_W,
  x = data$wage
)

## Call: binsreg
## 
## Binscatter Plot
## Bin selection method (binsmethod)  =  IMSE direct plug-in
## Placement (binspos)                =  Quantile-spaced
## Derivative (deriv)                 =  0
## 
## Group (by)                         =  Full Sample
## Sample size (n)                    =  20395
## # of distinct values (Ndist)       =  12159
## # of clusters (Nclust)             =  NA
## dots, degree (p)                   =  0
## dots, smooth (s)                   =  0
## # of bins (nbins)                  =  32
binsreg::binsreg(
  y = data$y_F,
  x = data$fee
)

## Call: binsreg
## 
## Binscatter Plot
## Bin selection method (binsmethod)  =  IMSE direct plug-in
## Placement (binspos)                =  Quantile-spaced
## Derivative (deriv)                 =  0
## 
## Group (by)                         =  Full Sample
## Sample size (n)                    =  20395
## # of distinct values (Ndist)       =  12820
## # of clusters (Nclust)             =  NA
## dots, degree (p)                   =  0
## dots, smooth (s)                   =  0
## # of bins (nbins)                  =  32
binsreg::binsreg(
  y = data$y_W_residual,
  x = data$wage_residual
)

## Call: binsreg
## 
## Binscatter Plot
## Bin selection method (binsmethod)  =  IMSE direct plug-in
## Placement (binspos)                =  Quantile-spaced
## Derivative (deriv)                 =  0

## Group (by)                         =  Full Sample

## # of clusters (Nclust)             =  NA

## dots, smooth (s)                   =  0

binsreg::binsreg(
  y = data$y_F_residual,
  x = data$fee_residual
)

## Call: binsreg

ols

fml <- 
  paste(
    paste(
      var_names$x_names,
      collapse = " + "
    ),
    "| cz + year + firm_id"
  )

data %>%
  fixest::feols(
    data = .,
    fml = 
      paste(
        "y_W ~ wage + fee +",
        fml
      ) %>%
      as.formula()
  ) %>%
  modelsummary::modelsummary()
## Variables 'type_1', 'type_2' and 25 others have been removed because of collinearity (see $collin.var).
Model 1
wage −0.135
(0.207)
fee −0.554
(0.120)
daily 0.863
(0.099)
shokai 0.478
(0.096)
oversea 0.499
(0.247)
cocurrent 0.473
(0.072)
Num.Obs. 20395
R2 0.561
R2 Adj. 0.475
R2 Within 0.039
R2 Pseudo
AIC 94065.5
BIC 120512.6
Log.Lik. −43694.732
Std.Errors by: cz
FE: cz X
FE: year X
FE: firm_id X

iv

fml <- 
  paste(
    paste(
      var_names$x_names,
      collapse = " + "
    ),
    "| cz + year + firm_id |",
    paste(
      "wage + fee ~",
      paste(
        var_names$iv_dist_selected_names,
        collapse = " + "
      )
    )
  )

fml <- 
  paste(
    paste(
      var_names$x_names,
      collapse = " + "
    ),
    "| cz + year + firm_id |",
    paste(
      "wage + fee ~",
      paste(
        var_names$iv_dist_selected_names,
        collapse = " + "
      )
    )
  ) 

data %>%
  fixest::feols(
    data = .,
    fml = 
      paste(
        "y_W ~ 1 +",
        fml
      ) %>%
      as.formula()
  ) %>%
  modelsummary::modelsummary()
